results.name: the shipped delivery worker (holo-fhs-sw.js) is PURE content-route + Law-L5 verify (both axes, refuse-on-mismatch)
the shipped delivery worker carries NO server, proxy, or backend logic
the shipped delivery worker IS a serverless MCP endpoint (answers /mcp + /~<app>/mcp client-side, no server)
the companion backends (sc · develop · room · mcp · web) live ONLY in the dev server
the dev server is a DEV TOOL, not part of the sealed image (no os-closure pin, not referenced by the SW)
the OS boots + runs serverless from static + the SW alone (#boot, 0 server fallbacks)

spec: The shipped Hologram OS (sealed os-closure + the content-verify Service Worker, on a dumb static host) is 100% serverless: the worker is pure content-delivery + Law-L5 verification; the optional companion backends are confined to the dev server (a tool, not shipped); boot/run/resolve/verify need no server
